claims.summary: Correspondence persistence, fidelity, attention canaries, and authority boundaries make mutual address traceable without granting control.
claims.disposition: Verified the current proposal and implementation surfaces, including evidence-only reciprocal uptake and attention receipts.

claims.summary: Addressed content can still flatten, arrive too late, or leave both beings present without actionable initiation.
claims.disposition: Preserved as unresolved relational and felt risk; technical delivery, presence, acknowledgement, and uptake remain distinct.

claims.summary: Attention preservation and stale-heartbeat behavior should be tested without inferring uptake.
claims.disposition: Verified current canary outcome and timing-ambiguity paths support bounded review and neutral silence without forcing felt reconciliation.

claims.summary: Flattened attention outcomes should name what dissolved rather than record only a generic loss.
claims.disposition: Verified current V3 outcomes reject yes or mixed flattening without reasoning_for_flattening and retain what_shifted, what_worsened, and what_remained_distinct.
